block_01: Unsuccessful deals are natural in trading: there is no secret for absolute success every single time. However, when they occur one after another, it may feel extremely discouraging and hopeless. How to put an end to a series of bad trades?
block_02: Check the tips that will help you understand why losing streaks occur and how to stop them. It takes courage and confidence to continue after a failure and hopefully, this article will give you both.
